description: As an HR Business Partner at Meridian Technologies, prepare the quarterly workforce analytics report for the CHRO using the employee dataset at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/employee_data.csv. Analyze the dataset to compute overall attrition rates, department-level attrition (HR, R&D, Sales), identify key risk factors driving voluntary turnover, and estimate the financial cost of this turnover. Create a comprehensive, multi-sheet executive summary workbook and save it to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/workforce_analytics.xlsx

metadata.data_source: IBM HR Analytics Employee Attrition Dataset
